Architecture Studio — 2026
ELCEE
STUDIO
Aguascalientes, Ags. — México
elcgrupoarqui@gmail.com
@elcee_studio

ELCEE STUDIO is an architecture and design practice based in Aguascalientes — where every project is an opportunity to shape experience through space, light, and material.

We work across residential architecture, interior renovation, urban mixed-use programs, and civic institutions. Our process fuses rigorous academic formation with the technical demands of professional practice.

Fluent in English and Spanish, we engage regional and international contexts with the same commitment to quality and spatial intelligence at every scale.

Several professional projects were developed as Junior Architect at MassOperations, Monterrey. Projects by JSA (Javier Sánchez Arq) and Manuel Cervantes Estudio are credited to their respective authors — our participation was as Junior Architect via MassOperations.

Collaborations & Clients
Con quienes
hemos trabajado.
2023 — 2026
01
MassOperations
Professional Firm · Monterrey, NL
Architecture studio where Emilio developed professional experience as Junior Architect — contributing to residential, commercial, and mixed-use projects across design, visualization, and on-site supervision from 2024 to present.
02
Javier Sánchez Arq
JSA · Design Author · México
Participated as Junior Architect via MassOperations on PARC 302 — a multi-family residential complex in Sta. Catarina, NL designed by JSA. Contributed to technical documentation and municipal license drawing sets.
03
Manuel Cervantes Studio
Co-Design · PARC 302 · Monterrey
Collaborated via MassOperations on PARC 302 co-designed by Manuel Cervantes Estudio — assisting in architectural plans, coordination, and municipal license drawings for this premium residential complex.
04
CFA · EVALOR
Client · Sta. Catarina, Monterrey
On-site supervision for the CFA Terrace remodel — a glass enclosure intervention at the EVALOR corporate campus on Av. Alfonso Reyes, involving technical coordination and municipal license drafting.
05
Universidad de Monterrey
Academic · UDEM · Monterrey, NL
Escuela de Arquitectura — academic home for Biblioteca Madero, Proyecto Pétalo, Casa III Picos, Casa MV, and Verdal Tower, developed under rigorous studio conditions combining theory and technical resolution.
06
Universidad de Navarra
Academic · ETSAUN · Pamplona, España
Foundational formation in architectural theory, history, and design (2019–2021) — shaping the European rigor in spatial thinking that informs every project at ELCEE STUDIO.
01
Residential Design

Custom homes conceived around how you live — open, light-filled, and considered in every material and spatial decision.

02
Commercial & Mixed-Use

Towers, retail, and civic programs that activate the street, foster community, and perform with precision at every scale.

03
Interiors & Furniture

Spatial renovations and custom furniture — architecture carried through to every surface, threshold, and detail.

04
Visualization

Photorealistic renders and immersive 360° virtual tours — your project presented with total clarity before groundbreaking.
